summary._source: Benzodiazepines are GABA-A positive allosteric modulators used as anxiolytics, sedatives, and anticonvulsants (e.g. diazepam, alprazolam, clonazepam).
summary.text: Le benzodiazepine sono modulatori allosterici positivi del GABA-A usati come ansiolitici, sedativi e anticonvulsivanti (es. diazepam, alprazolam, clonazepam).
